pricing_v2.titleBr: Credit pricing for sector calculators and decision reports
pricing_v2.subtitle: Buy credits, run professional-grade calculators, and export decision-ready PDF reports without a subscription.

footer.pricingDisclaimer: Credits are consumed only when a premium calculation/report is generated. Prices are listed in USD and may exclude local taxes, VAT, bank fees, or currency conversion charges applied by your payment provider.
footer.companyInfo: SectorCalc provides professional calculation tools and decision reports for engineering, manufacturing, finance, quality, logistics, and operational teams.

guarantee.title: 7-day practical-use guarantee
guarantee.desc: If a paid credit package does not help you generate a usable professional calculation or PDF report, contact support within 7 days. We will review the case and apply the refund policy where eligible.

testimonial.quote: SectorCalc turns scattered engineering and costing checks into a structured decision report. It saves time before quotes, audits, and internal approvals.
testimonial.author: Operations and costing teams using SectorCalc

premiumAccess.publicPreviewTitle: Try this calculator before you subscribe
premiumAccess.signedInPreviewTitle: Preview mode - Pro unlocks full reports
premiumAccess.signedInPreviewDescription: You can run the calculator and review the preview verdict. PDF export, saved history and calculation summary require an active Pro plan or single-report purchase.
premiumAccess.lockedExport: PDF and spreadsheet export are available on Pro plans.
premiumAccess.lockedReportHistory: Saved report history requires a signed-in Pro account.
premiumAccess.lockedTrustTrace: Calculation summary is a Pro-only pro feature.
premiumAccess.fullReportRequiresPro: Full exportable report requires SectorCalc Pro.

signInErrors.unauthorized-domain: Bu alan adı Google girişi için yetkilendirilmemiş.
signInErrors.user-not-found: Bu e-posta adresiyle kayıtlı hesap bulunamadı.
signInErrors.email-already-in-use: Bu e-posta ile zaten bir hesap mevcut.
